title: Truist Is Bullish On Avery Dennison, Sees Sharp Upside
text: Truist analyst Michael Roxland Avery Dennison Corp (NYSE: AVY) initiated coverage with a Buy rating and a price target of $227 (an upside of 33%). Roxland argues that the Street underestimates growth in RFID and Intelligent Labels.

title: Avery Dennison: A Unique And Slightly Underpriced Firm
text: Avery Dennison has seen some nice growth recently, and its cash flow picture continues to expand at a nice clip.

title: Reasons to Retain Avery Dennison (AVY) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) is worth retaining in one's portfolio owing to robust demand for consumer-packaged goods, investment in high-value products and positive growth prospects.
